class.name: Batch Provision with Lazy Lab Request AWS functionality

test-method.name: AWS_TC46 - Lazy Lab Actions - Create, Stop, Start and Delete Lab - Account
AWS_TC47 - Lazy Lab Actions - Cleanup, Suspend and Resume via Policy Assignment - Account
AWS_TC48 - Lazy Lab Actions - Assign Budget, Remove All Budget and Set Budget via Policy Assignment - Account
AWS_TC49 - Lazy Lab Actions - Quota Duration, Quota Budget, Manually Remove Budget and Quota Top-Up Budget - Account
